ddt:Target.Name: Entry_AVM_Renault 27_09_2018
ddt:Target.Description:
[13] 2018/07/17 Alberto Isorna Auto Ident mis à Jour
[12] 2018/06/15 Alberto Isorna Auto Ident mis à Jour
[11] 2018/05/25 Renault MEDDEB Safouene (renexter) HardwareNumber.BasicPartList mis à jour
[10] 2018/05/24 Renault MEDDEB Safouene (renexter) New Category was created " Plant tool ". Update Master data wrinting request
[9] 2018/03/20 Renault MEDDEB Safouene (renexter) Update After sale methode. Update MAster data wrinting request
(8) 2018/01/23 Renault MEDDEB Safouene (renexter) update the auto identification parameter
(7) 2016/10/07 Renault MEDDEB Safouene (renexter) Add DataWrite$32_Master_data_writing Request
(6) 2016/10/07 Renault HOSNI Omar (renexter) Add VIN reading and writing some correction to calibrations screen
(5) 2016/07/19 Renault HOSNI Omar (renexter) Ajout de l'LID 21 et 1F (Config writing #1 et Configuration Part Number (factory need)
(4) 2016/06/07 Renault HOSNI Omar (renexter) Ajout des DTC Diag MUX
[3] 2016/05/23 Renault HOSNI Omar (renexter) Mise à jour des pramètres Rapport de maintenabilité et envoi manuel pour tous les reqêtes
[2] 2015/06/15 Nissan XX2 C.Kudo Modified CF sheet's mnemonics. [[2.17]]
[1]2014/12/03 XX2 R.Urushihata Modified Target address 83H to 61H
[N]2014/7/29 XX2 H.Yokoyama initial Create.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
[U1133]IPA wheel pulse rapid change history error
[U1134]IPA wheel pulse rapid change history error
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: RoutineEntryStatus
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Data.Name: DataA_READING PARAMETER OF PAENGER'S SIDE CAMERA (CALIBRATION)
DataA_READING PARAMETER OF DRIVER'S SIDE CAMERA (CALIBRATION)
DataA_READING PARAMETER OF FRONT CAMERA (FINE ADJUSTMENT)
DataB_READING PARAMETER OF PAENGER'S SIDE CAMERA (FINE ADJUSTMENT)
DataB_READING PARAMETER OF DRIVER'S SIDE CAMERA (FINE ADJUSTMENT)
DataB_READING PARAMETER OF REAR CAMERA (FINE ADJUSTMENT)
DataB_READING PARAMETER OF Rotation Radius Adjustment
DataC_READING PARAMETER OF FRONT CAMERA (ZOOM value)
DataC_READING PARAMETER OF PAENGER'S SIDE CAMERA (ZOOM value)
DataC_READING PARAMETER OF DRIVER'S SIDE CAMERA (ZOOM value)
DataC_READING PARAMETER OF REAR CAMERA (ZOOM value)
DataB_Sonar Off Pop Up Setting Change
DataB_Adjustment Fixed Guide Line of FR-Wide View
DataC_W_ZOOM Function of PASSENGER'S SIDE CAMERA
DataC_W_ZOOM Function of DRIVER'S SIDE CAMERA
DataA_IOC_Resister neutral point of steering sensor
DataA_SR_Choice "Front camera" on calibration view of camera mode
DataA_SR_Choice "Passenger's side camera" on calibration view of camera mode
DataA_SR_Choice "Driver's side camera" on calibration view of camera mode
DataA_SR_Choice "Rear camera" on calibration view of camera mode
DataA_SR_Choice "Back" on choice camera in the mode calibration view of camera
DataB_SR_Choice "YES" on resister neutral point ofsteering sensor
DataB_SR_Choice "Camera" on fine adjustment of top view
DataB_SR_Choice "Adjustment of guide line of rear wide view"
DataB_SR_Choice "Adjustment of guide line of front wide view"
DataC_READING BSW INFORMATION DISPLAY OF THE CANCELLATION CAUSE
DataC_READING LDW INFORMATION DISPLAY OF THE CANCELLATION CAUSE
DataB_READING PARAMETER OF Electric status mirror
DataRead$23#3-4_Mean vehicle speed after the filter application of 4 wheel pulses
DataRead$34#18-19_Internal Parameter Angle Of View Estimate
DataRead$34#20_For A Top View Parameter Horizontal Difference
DataRead$34#21_For A Top View Parameter Perpendicular Difference

Item.Text: Internal Parameter error (Data exchanged between tasks in software abnormal)
Target extraction Recognition rate decrease (refer to byte #22)
Pattern extraction incomplete from Master data
No vertical synchronization video signal from camera

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory
